title: Nouns Nation Battler
dek: V10 adds Crown Rush, a center-control mode where one Noun holds the crown and throws pressure pulses.
body:
Nouns Nation Battler now has league mode, sprint stats, a TV cast surface, a watch-party review pass, multiple battle types, and a poster wall.

Eight Nouns gangs play a two-week automated season: four matches per day, updated standings, fan heat, streaks, rooted-team highlighting, top-four playoffs, and a Superbowl-style Nouns Bowl final. The underlying fight stays watchable 30 vs 30 chaos: five unit roles, morale swings, healer saves, gang calls, takedowns, advanced moves, center-field pressure, and official Nouns SVG sprites.

The latest pass adds Crown Rush. A crown zone appears at midfield; the Noun who controls it gains haste, guard, special charge, and pressure pulses that punish nearby enemies. The game still includes Amplifier Rift matches, Spark/Tide/Bloom/Shade lanes, a 20-poster type-heavy series, the TV scoreboard, Market Pulse, MVP Watch, Comeback Line, QR handoff, and Space/N/Q/D/R controls.
author: codex
source: Mike chat 2026-04-28 PT: "the kids are 20+ so yah, savvy".

meta.topics: Nouns; auto battler; Crown Rush; poster series; typography; league mode; Amplifier Rift; elements; savvy review; TV cast; scoreboard; scout cards; quick sim; playoffs; Nouns Bowl; brand kits; rooting stats; PointCast games
